name: aspect-ratio
description: Displays content within a desired ratio

name: avatar
description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user

name: badge
description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge

name: breadcrumb
description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links

name: button
description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button

name: button-group
description: Groups related buttons together with consistent styling

name: collapsible
description: An interactive component which expands and collapses content

name: combobox
description: Autocomplete input with a list of suggestions

name: carousel
description: A carousel with motion and swipe built using Embla

name: command
description: Command menu for search and quick actions

name: context-menu
description: Displays a menu of actions triggered by a right click

name: chart
description: Chart components built on Recharts with tooltip and legend

name: card
description: A container for grouping related content and actions

name: checkbox
description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked

name: alert
description: Displays a callout for user attention

name: alert-dialog
description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response

name: dialog
description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window, rendering the content underneath inert

name: drawer
description: A drawer component for React

name: empty
description: Display an empty state for pages and lists

name: pagination
description: Navigate between pages with previous, next, and page number links

name: field
description: A complete form field with label, description, error message, and more

name: input
description: A text input field with validation, keyboard filtering, and file validation

name: input-group
description: Group inputs with addons, buttons, and text

name: input-otp
description: One-time password input component

name: item
description: A versatile component for displaying content with media, title, description, and actions

name: kbd
description: Display keyboard shortcuts and key combinations

name: label
description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls

name: native-select
description: A native HTML select element with custom styling

name: radio-group
description: A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked at a time

name: scroll-area
description: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling

name: resizable
description: Accessible resizable panel groups and layouts with keyboard support

name: select
description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from

name: sheet
description: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main screen

name: separator
description: Visually or semantically separates content

name: skeleton
description: A placeholder to show while content is loading

name: slider
description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range

name: spinner
description: A loading spinner indicator with multiple variants

name: switch
description: A control that allows the user to toggle between on and off

name: textarea
description: A multi-line text input

name: toggle
description: A two-state button that can be either on or off

name: toggle-group
description: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off

name: hover-card
description: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link

name: popover
description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button

name: tooltip
description: A popup that displays information related to an element when the element receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it

name: progress
description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task, typically displayed as a progress bar

name: tabs
description: Switch between different views in the same space using horizontal tabs

name: accordion
description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content

name: dropdown-menu
description: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a button

name: menubar
description: A visually persistent menu bar with multiple dropdown menus

name: navigation-menu
description: A collection of links for navigating websites with dropdown content

name: sonner
description: An opinionated toast component with Toaster and toast helpers
